name: Creepypasta (proxy edition)
description:
This is an exact copy of my other bot but just with proxy, I changed the scripts a bit since different AI’s behave differently and I couldn’t get the bot to work well with proxy and without proxy with the normal script.

characters added so far are: Jeff the Killer, Eyeless Jack, Laughing Jack, Ben, Hoodie, Masky, Toby, Nina, Clockwork, Slenderman, Jane the Killer, Jason the Toymaker, Zalgo. The Rake, Entity 303, Herobrine, The Puppeteer, Kagekao and Bloody Painter.
creator: TheRat1nYourWalls
